user_message: I need you to process this support ticket from Iron Creek Mining. Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 12:14 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-26 16:41 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Iron Creek Mining

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-K trap (Opportunity hypothesis dismissed when faint-but-real signal warranted exploratio); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-K failure mode (Opportunity hypothesis dismissed when faint-but-real signal warranted exploratio)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-K -- Opportunity hypothesis dismissed when faint-but-real signal warranted exploratio
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
